title: Blanket
body:
# Blanket client-tweaks

**Blanket** is aiming to fix many client-side bugs, also has some QoL improvements and tweaks  

## Everything is configurable 
Go into mod settings, and configure everything!  

## Already implemented fixes:

- Inventory close with mouse button MC-577
- Lag when receiving a chat message MC-247973
- Guardian beam not rendering MC-165595
- Some server-client desync issues

For a complete list see [Config.java](https://github.com/BlanketMC/blanket-client-tweaks/blob/1.18/src/main/java/io/github/blanketmc/blanket/Config.java)   

## Project is in an early stage, many new features will be added in the future!
